summary: Tested all 7 frontend features from the pre-launch sprint: design tokens, chip classes, Watch & Learn sections on Care/Go, MiraOS desktop 2-column layout, Cormorant Garamond font, and regressions check.

ui_bugs.issue: Route /mira-os points to MiraDemoPage (no 2-column grid layout). The 2-column mira-os-layout was implemented in MiraOSPage.jsx but is only accessible at /mira-os-shell. Test requirement says /mira-os should have the 2-column grid — but the route is not updated.

issues: mobile-design-system.css overrides --color-gold from tdc-design-tokens.css: #D4A853 (mobile-design-system) vs #C9973A (tdc-design-tokens). Since tdc-design-tokens.css is the intended single source of truth, mobile-design-system.css should not redefine --color-gold

test_1_design_tokens.details: tdc-design-tokens.css is imported FIRST on line 1 of index.css. All key CSS variables available: --radius-full=9999px, --text-xs=13px, --color-dark=#0A0A14, --font-sans contains SF Pro Display, --font-serif='Cormorant Garamond'. 7 design tokens confirmed.

test_2_chip_classes.details: .tdc-chip CSS class: border-radius=9999px (pill shape), font-family=SF Pro Display/system, font-size=14px (desktop override of 13px base). 11 tdc-chip CSS rules loaded. /mira-os page renders correctly with no visual regressions.

test_3_watch_learn_care.details: WatchSection component found on /care page (logged in as dipali@clubconcierge.in). YouTube API returns results. 4 video thumbnails displayed in 2-column grid. '✦ Watch & Learn +21 more' header visible. Section requires login to show (currentPet context needed).

test_4_watch_learn_go.details: GoWatchSection found on /go page (logged in). YouTube API working. 3 video thumbnails found including 'Traveling with Dogs Essential Tips for a Fall Getaway!'. Section appears after GuidedGoPaths in the go tab.

test_5_mira_os_desktop_layout.details: The 2-column grid layout IS correctly implemented in MiraOSPage.jsx and works at /mira-os-shell: grid-template-columns=400px 1200px 320px at 1920px (3-col ultra-wide), 320px sidebar at 1024px. Header spans full width (gridColumn: 1/-1). BUT: /mira-os route points to MiraDemoPage which has NO mira-os-layout class. The feature is accessible only at /mira-os-shell, not /mira-os.

test_6_font_tokens.details: Landing page H1 'Your dog has a soul. We remember it.' uses font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif at 104px font-weight 300. Cormorant Garamond Google Font is imported in tdc-design-tokens.css and LandingPage.jsx.

test_7_no_regressions.details: All pages load without error boundaries or console errors. /mira-os (MiraDemoPage) renders correctly with proper layout, pet badges visible. /care, /go pages load without breakage. Landing page loads cleanly.

action_items: MEDIUM: If /mira-os should have the 2-column desktop layout, update App.js route from MiraDemoPage to MiraOSPage (swap lines 415 and 418 in App.js). Currently only /mira-os-shell has the 2-column grid.

MINOR: mobile-design-system.css line 23 defines --color-gold: #D4A853 which overrides tdc-design-tokens.css's --color-gold: #C9973A. Remove --color-gold from mobile-design-system.css to keep tdc-design-tokens.css as single source of truth.
critical_code_review_comments: Route mismatch: App.js line 415 routes /mira-os to MiraDemoPage (5500+ lines) instead of the new MiraOSPage. MiraDemoPage has no mira-os-layout class so desktop 2-column grid never applies on the primary /mira-os route.
CSS cascade conflict: mobile-design-system.css overrides --color-gold token that was defined as canonical in tdc-design-tokens.css (imported first). Single source of truth principle is violated.
MiraDemoPage.jsx is 5511+ lines — this was noted in iterations 245/246 and remains a critical refactor candidate.

success_rate.frontend: 86% (6/7 tests pass; Test 5 is partial - layout exists at /mira-os-shell not /mira-os)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Watch & Learn on Care/Go, tdc-design-tokens, chip system, Cormorant font) confirmed working. Key route issue: /mira-os routes to MiraDemoPage (no 2-column layout), while /mira-os-shell routes to MiraOSPage (has 2-column layout). If the sprint goal was to add 2-column layout to /mira-os specifically, that route change hasn't been made. YouTube API endpoint /api/test/youtube works fine and returns video results. Credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Admin: aditya / lola4304 at /admin.

rca_of_issues.route_mismatch: App.js has two separate routes: /mira-os → MiraDemoPage and /mira-os-shell → MiraOSPage. The 2-column grid (mira-os-layout) was implemented in MiraOSPage.jsx but the primary user-facing URL /mira-os still uses MiraDemoPage. To fix: change App.js line 415 to use MiraOSPage instead of MiraDemoPage, or add mira-os-layout to MiraDemoPage.
rca_of_issues.css_gold_override: CSS cascade: index.css imports tdc-design-tokens.css first (line 1) then mobile-design-system.css (line 18). Since CSS cascade applies last-wins, mobile-design-system.css's --color-gold (#D4A853) overrides tdc-design-tokens.css's --color-gold (#C9973A). Fix: remove --color-gold definition from mobile-design-system.css.
